Description: POST /api/download creates task_id and spawns daemon thread
Keywords: start create task thread spawn daemon
Backend Logic: Generate UUID task_id. Init progress_store entry. Start _download_worker thread

Description: yt-dlp downloads video with progress_hooks callback
Keywords: download video progress hook percent speed eta
Backend Logic: progress_hook updates progress_store with percent/speed/eta from yt-dlp callback dict

Keywords: audio mp3 extract process postprocessor ffmpeg
Backend Logic: yt-dlp runs FFmpegExtractAudio postprocessor. Status changes to 'finished' then finds output file

Description: FFmpeg merges separate video+audio streams to MP4
Keywords: merge video audio mp4 ffmpeg format combine
Backend Logic: yt-dlp merge_output_format: 'mp4' handles automatically via postprocessor

Description: FFmpeg burns SRT subtitles into video file
Keywords: subtitle burn embed srt ffmpeg filter font style
Backend Logic: Fetch SRT via _get_cached_subtitle → write temp .srt → run ffmpeg with subtitles filter
Frontend Logic: Show 'Burning subtitles...' status. Skip if subtitle_lang='none' or audio-only

Description: Move from temp dir to user's save directory
Keywords: move file temp save directory copy rename
Backend Logic: Find output file by _TAG suffix → handle duplicate names → shutil.move to save_dir

Keywords: done complete finish save filepath filename size
Backend Logic: Set status='done' with filepath/filename/file_size in progress_store. Clean temp dir
Frontend Logic: progressBar.classList.add('done') → green. Show filename. addToHistory(). Enable download button

Backend Logic: Catch all exceptions → set status='error' with error message in progress_store
Frontend Logic: Show error message in progressStatus. Enable download button. No history entry

Description: Server-Sent Events deliver progress to frontend
Keywords: sse event source stream poll progress realtime
Backend Logic: Generator yields 'data: {json}\n\n' events. Polls progress_store every 0.5s. Closes on done/error
Frontend Logic: new EventSource(url) → onmessage → parse JSON → update UI. onerror → close + re-enable button

Keywords: hook callback downloaded bytes total speed eta percent
Backend Logic: Hook receives dict: status/downloaded_bytes/total_bytes/speed/eta. Calculate percent. Format speed/eta

Keywords: format size bytes kb mb gb human readable
Backend Logic: Backend sends raw bytes in file_size field
